title: merremia turpethum
intro: Merremia turpethum is a plant species belonging to the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as turpeth or gokshura. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and laxative effects. The health benefits of Merremia turpethum include treating kidney stones, reducing blood pressure, and managing weight loss. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into capsules, tablets, or powder, and can also be consumed as a decoction or tea.
